steps.title: Compare the two actions
steps.content: Gogol carves his name into clay and leaves his signature below paintings. In both cases, he creates a visible sign of his name on an art object.

steps.title: Pick the shared meaning
steps.content: "Marks" fits both actions because it means makes a visible sign or impression. B, C, and D mean passes, turns, and follows, none of which describes carving a name or placing a signature. The answer is A.
